General.Name: HMC Capital Ltd
General.Description: HMC Capital Limited, together with its subsidiaries, owns and manages real estate focused funds in Australia. The company invests in high-conviction global megatrends and scalable real assets on behalf of individuals, large institutions, and super funds. The company was formerly known as Home Consortium Limited. HMC Capital Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.

8.Name: Mr. Chris  Maher
8.Title: MD & Group Head of Government & Strategic Programs
